steps.title: Set up FOIL to find the coefficient of x
steps.content: When multiplying $(\frac{1}{2}x + \frac{3}{2}) \times (\frac{3}{2}x + \frac{1}{2})$, we use FOIL to expand. The coefficient of $x$ comes only from the outer and inner products—we can skip the first and last products.

steps.title: Calculate the outer and inner products
